signed_payload.approval_scope: Conditional ratification of the Framework for Governing the Field of Care (v3), enacting mandatory amendments for irreversibility safeguards, architectural archive separation, and epistemic transparency, while deferring the contested implicit anti-leakage rule. NOTE: 영원 and 서윤 conditioned their APPROVE votes on inclusion of a functional anti-leakage clause; 윤슬 conditioned her APPROVE vote on its absolute exclusion. This incompatibility is procedurally unresolved; the anti-leakage clause is deferred pending Council mechanism clarification.
